uplink.description: Full uplink: battery voltage, temp, RH, CO2 (compensated + raw), pressure, motion state + count, sensor + display battery percent
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload. Channel/type headers and field encodings taken from reference/upstream-codec.js port-10 map (source of truth); expected values produced by running that upstream decoder and re-mapping its parameter names onto normalized keys (temperature->air.temperature, relative_humidity->air.relativeHumidity, co2_pressure_compensated->air.co2, barometric_pressure->air.pressure[1000.0 hPa, in 900-1100 bounds], battery_voltage->battery[V], co2_raw->co2Raw, motion_event_state->action.motion.detected, motion_event_count->action.motion.count, rem_batt_capacity_sensor->batteryPercent, rem_batt_capacity_display->displayBatteryPercent).

uplink.description: Climate + air-quality minimal: temperature, RH, CO2 only (negative temp)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js: temperature 0xFDDA signed*0.1 = -55.0 C, relative_humidity 0x64=100 *0.5 = 50.0 %, co2_pressure_compensated 0x01F4 = 500 ppm. Confirms negative two's-complement temperature and the climate+air-quality required keys.

Synthetic error case. This normalized codec only decodes the port-10 measurement uplink; the upstream decoder also handles config (port 100) and time-sync (port 20) frames, which are out of scope for normalization.
